q1_process: Customer churn prediction and intervention for a B2B SaaS product
q1_volume: 5,000 monthly active users, 12% monthly churn rate
q3_volume: 2 years of historical user behavior data, 150 features
q5_current_performance: Customer Success team reacts after churn, 5% recovery rate
q5_frustrations: too slow, no early warning system
q6_measurement: weekly cohort analysis, ARR retention, CSAT
